meta.title: The Geopolitics of America's Shale Revolution: Middle East Panel: Brenda Shaffer and Nikos Tsafos
meta.description: This conference examines how U.S. oil and natural gas exports reshaped the balance of global energy power, and features a Middle East panel with Brenda Shaffer and Nikos Tsafos.
